title: Difficulty Curve & Hint System
summary: Difficulty Curve has been stuck at 6/10 for 4 straight days. Levels 4-5 (NAND/NOR) represent a conceptual jump from single-gate to multi-gate solutions without scaffolding. This day adds: a progressive hint system that can be triggered per-level, a 'gate chaining' tutorial hint on level 4, rebalanced level order, and improved level descriptions that guide thinking. Also adding a 'skip level' option for stuck players.

tasks.description: Implement a hint system — each level can have up to 3 progressive hints. First hint is free, subsequent hints cost a star from the rating. Hints appear as dismissible tooltips over the canvas. Add a 'Hint' button to the info panel.
acceptance_criteria: Hint button visible in info panel
Clicking shows progressive hints (hint 1, then 2, then 3)
First hint is free, hints 2+ reduce max stars to 2/1
Each level has custom hint text in levels.js
Hint state resets when level is restarted

tasks.description: Add hint text to all 10 levels, with focus on levels 4-5 which need the most guidance. Level 4 (NAND) hints should progressively teach: 'NAND = NOT(AND)', 'Connect inputs to AND gate, then invert the output with NOT', 'You need 2 gates: AND → NOT → output'
acceptance_criteria: Level 4 (NAND) hints teach the concept step-by-step
Later levels have hints that teach composition patterns

tasks.description: Improve level descriptions to be more instructive — add educational text that explains what the target behavior means and how to think about it
acceptance_criteria: Each level description explains the concept clearly
Level 4: explains that NAND is the opposite of AND
Level 5: explains that NOR is the opposite of OR
Descriptions guide thinking without giving away the solution

tasks.description: Add a 'Skip Level' button that appears after the player has been on a level for 60+ seconds or used all hints. Skipping unlocks the next level but awards 0 stars.
acceptance_criteria: Skip button appears after 60 seconds on a level OR after all 3 hints used
Skipping unlocks next level with 0 stars
Skip button is styled distinctly (dimmer, less prominent)

testing_focus: Hint system works progressively on all levels
Star penalty for hints is calculated correctly
Skip level works and unlocks next level
Level descriptions are clear and educational
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
